items.title: Focused GSC formatter, lookup, and SEO routing contracts pass
items.precondition: PR 151 hardening branch with workspace dependencies available
items.expected: All focused tests pass without a database or external network call
items.evidence: 2026-07-14: 3 test files passed; 15 tests passed in 142ms
items.notes: Covers bounded JSON formatting, aggregation, empty/failure fallback, one-fetch behavior, GEO-only delivery, and cached-system exclusion.

items.title: TypeScript and Code Constitution structural gates pass
items.expected: TypeScript exits zero and no mechanized backend Constitution violation is introduced
items.evidence: 2026-07-14: TypeScript exit 0; strict Constitution check exit 0 with zero backend structural violations
items.notes: Existing advisory findings are outside this PR's files and scope.

items.title: Full repository regression and lint pass
items.precondition: Implementation complete and focused checks green
items.expected: No failure caused by PR 151 or its hardening changes
items.evidence: 2026-07-14 isolated PR head: build exit 0 and 41 files/346 tests passed. Combined with dev/dave 14032e01: clean synthetic merge, build exit 0, 59 files/452 tests passed, strict Constitution exit 0, backend lint exit 0, and dependency-cruiser reported 0 errors.
items.notes: Frontend lint still reports three pre-existing errors in untouched files. The PR diff contains no frontend files, so these are not regressions from PR 151 or its hardening changes.

items.title: Authorized dev agent generation validates real-data and fallback behavior
items.precondition: Explicit user authorization; one GSC-connected dev project and one no-data dev project; apply_geo_content=false; no emails
steps: Generate GEO output for a GSC-connected project without auto-apply
Confirm a genuinely relevant measured query is preferred and unrelated queries are ignored
Generate GEO output for a project with no GSC data without auto-apply
Confirm the target query is inferred from real page content and the output schema is unchanged
items.expected: Both paths complete without blocking generation, mutating page content, or sending email
items.evidence: Not run pre-merge: dev/dave does not yet contain PR 151 or these fixes.
items.notes: Running against the current dev deployment would validate the old implementation, not the reviewed combined tree.
items.waiver: Deferred to post-merge dev validation. The merge gate is covered by hermetic prompt-contract tests plus the full suite on a clean synthetic merge with latest dev/dave; post-merge validation must keep apply_geo_content=false and send no emails.
